summary: Proposed 'Ship Biography' framework with 7 phases (Hook + 6 body) that treats the ship as the protagonist. Based on documentary research from channels like Drachinifel, Montemayor, and Battleship New Jersey. Key innovations: (1) Hook about ship SCALE not captain, (2) Separate 'Blueprint' and 'Mutation' phases instead of one vague 'Context', (3) Characters woven throughout instead of a dedicated phase, (4) Dark Reality merged into 'Human Engine' as cost of operating the machine, (5) 'Death' and 'Archaeological Ghost' split into separate phases. Includes anti-patterns, pacing guides, chapter structure affinities, and 4 open questions for user.
